meanings.definition: a customary way of operation or behavior
examples: it is their practice to give annual raises
a hard theory to put into practice
differences between theory and praxis of communism
I took over his practice when he retired

meanings.definition: knowledge of how something is usually done
examples: it is not the local practice to wear shorts to dinner

meanings.definition: carry out or practice; as of jobs and professions

examples: We drilled French verbs every day
use care when going down the stairs
commit a random act of kindness
